description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test the code coverage that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a Python 3.9 matrix that checks out the repository, sets up Python, upgrades pip, installs dependencies and tools like Z3, Bitwuzla, Capstone, Unicorn, LIEF, and Triton, then runs unittests and collects code coverage with Codecov.
